title: oplismenus obtusus
intro: Oplismenus obtusus, commonly known as rough false-bamboo or blunt false-bamboo, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oplismenus obtusus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, making it a potential treatment for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Oplismenus obtusus typically involve drying and grinding the plant's leaves and stems into a powder or infusing them in hot water to create a tea.
